title: AI Lab — agent metadata.yaml
description: Schema for demos/demo0/agents/{agentN}/metadata.yaml. Describes how the platform scanner discovers and starts an agent. New fields can be added here without breaking existing agents.

entry_point.description: Python dotted path to the FastAPI app, e.g. agents.agent1.apis.main:app

template_version.description: Which agentx_vN_M template version this agent was spawned from (e.g. "1.0"). Optional for legacy agents; required for new ones.
